name: Legendary Mechromancer
description: Legendary Mechromancer is a legendary Hyperion class mod for Gaige in Borderlands 2. It can world drop from any appropriate loot source, with boosted drop odds from Vermivorous the Invincible, Pete the Invincible, Voracidous the Invincible, and the Ancient Dragons of Destruction.
notes: In normal play it is notable for lacking a unique in-game red flavour line. A special SHiFT reward version includes the red text "I am such a B.A." plus an extra caption about the lunch box holding more than sandwiches. That variant is available via a SHiFT code included with the Diamond Plate Loot Chest.

special.description: Max level bonus: +51% action skill cooldown rate.
special.title: "I am such a B.A."
